title: strychnos henningsii
intro: Strychnos henningsii, also known as the African strychnine tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Strychnos henningsii include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
